race.comment: BENEFITSOFMINE (5) is a fascinating runner, bringing Qld form. Now with Melody Cunningham and he comes here off an Avoca jumpout win, when he went to line seemingly with a bit in hand. Strikes the right to make an immediate impact in Vic. SECRET HELL (3) also resumes and he's trialled up well, just like he did last prep when he kicked off with a win, albeit in maiden grade. With added maturity here, though, he can step up. TRUST IN CHAD (10) led throughout last start to score an effortless 4.5 lengths win over 1175m at Albury and is worth considering despite the step up in class. On the other hand, CAMP CABLE (6) is down in grade on the two runs he had after the maiden win last prep. This easier and his jumpouts have been adequate.
